intentSynonyms: look up user posts in instagram
fetch a single user posts in instagram
view one specific user posts in instagram
get posts from a user in instagram
description: Get recent posts by a user. Requires the user numeric ID (use get_user_profile to find it from a username). Supports cursor-based pagination via max_id.

count.description: Number of posts to return (default 12, max 33)

max_id.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
